case_title: JOEL R WARDLAW VS. THERESA MARIANI AROCHE et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT AROCHE, THERESA MARIANI

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WARDLAW, JOEL R RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AROCHE, THERESA MARIANI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4124 FOLSOM STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94110, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WARDLAW, JOEL R AS TO DEFENDANT AROCHE, THERESA MARIANI DOES 1-10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT AROCHE, THERESA MARIANI
DECLARATION GARY W. SULLIVAN FILED RE: ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF EXECUTION AND THAT THE DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $60.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF WARDLAW, JOEL R
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WARDLAW, JOEL R SERVED NOV-13-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AROCHE, THERESA MARIANI
ORIGINAL SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF WARDLAW, JOEL R AS TO DEFENDANT AROCHE, THERESA MARIANI
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT AROCHE, THERESA MARIANI
MEMO TO SET RETURNED TO PLTF; DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT ENTERED ON 11-20-02
